data.content: Implemented agent stdout/stderr file logging (90a224f). Added logStdout/logStderr methods to InteractionLog interface in interaction-logger.ts. Wired stdout/stderr data handlers in terminal-manager.ts (both initial child and take-loop children) and orchestration-manager.ts. Updated log-lifecycle.ts to handle .stdout.log and .stderr.log file extensions for cleanup/compression. Added 11 new tests in agent-output-log.test.ts and 3 new tests in log-lifecycle.test.ts. Uses sequential write queue to prevent interleaved output. All 1656 tests pass, typecheck and build clean.
